issues.title: Region review dialog opened centered instead of beside instruction pane
issues.summary: The tester captured a manual region screenshot, but the review dialog appeared centered rather than anchored near the instruction pane as specified by the mockup.
issues.observed_behavior: The region capture completed and the review dialog appeared centered on the main window.
issues.expected_behavior: The review dialog should open flush beside the instruction pane when the pane is visible, falling back to center only when no pane is available.
issues.impact: Tester review is slower and the UI no longer matches the anchored-dialog design for screenshot evidence review.

suggested_response.subject: Testing finding: region review dialog placement
suggested_response.body_markdown: The region capture review dialog appears centered instead of beside the instruction pane. Evidence is attached from Step 1. Please verify the anchored placement rule from the #132 review dialog mockup before closing this item.

lineage.model_reasoning_summary: Evidence and transcript both indicate the review dialog placement did not match the anchored-pane target.

events.note: Synthetic sample issue created for Starter Pack validation.
